13 John Ridger

13 John Ridger

  • Position:
    Guard
  • Class:
    Freshman
  • Ht./Wt.:
    6-6 / 190

    Stockholm, Sweden

    Idrottsgymnasiet Lulea

Summary

Biography

Mississippi College
2025-26… Appeared in 6 games, totaling 7 points, 4 rebounds (1 offensive, 3 defensive) and 2 steals… Shot 3-for-7 from the field and 1-for-4 on 3-pointers… Pulled down a season-high 2 rebounds (2 defensive) vs. Belhaven on Nov. 20… Scored a season-high 4 points on 2-for-4 shooting at West Alabama on Feb. 5, adding a season-high 1 offensive rebound… Swiped a season-high 2 steals at UAH on Feb. 7 and hit a season-high 1 3-pointer (3 points)
No stats available for the current season.
